Body.Content:
Express mode ensures agents and apps receive timely and reliable responses by dramatically accelerating flow run times. This reduces flow failures, improves user experience, and eliminates costly interruptions caused by timeout issues. Organizations benefit from more dependable automations, higher adoption, and smoother operational workflows.

GA date: November CY2026

Preview date: November CY2025

message.Title: Microsoft Copilot Studio: Enable express mode for flows invoked by an agent or app
